name: OODS Foundry — Claude Desktop stdio MCP
summary: Connect Claude Desktop to the OODS MCP adapter via stdio transport. Alternative to the HTTP bridge.
notes: Claude Desktop stdio transport requires an absolute path to the adapter entry point.
The adapter spawns the native MCP server as a child process — build it first.
Stdio transport bypasses the HTTP bridge entirely — no port, no token, no CORS.
This is the recommended setup for local development with Claude Desktop.
